name: Solomon The Loved
description: Welcome King 👑 One SOLOMON represents one+ Shekel of digital gold. SOLOMON paves golden routes connecting crypto kingdoms. 🛤️ 100% of SOLOMON is liquid-minted, staying liquid-backed by trusted gold tokens like PAXG and XAUT. ⚡ SOLOMON is liquid-minted when the equivalent amount of gold-backed tokens is used to buy SOLOMON direct from the pools that were blessed with 100% of Max supply, solidifying the empire of Solomon the Loved. 🏰 Welcome citizen, you are now helping the roads of metals and cryptos to be linked, creating bridges of liquidity between ancient and future worlds by holding SOLOMON. 🔗 This token and its siblings QUICK and SOLID are for entertainment purposes only, and are not a vehicle for investment, nor do they promise returns or redeemability for gold, silver or metal-backed tokens. Project subject to change without notice. A hefty portion of fees pour into backing that's everlasting in locked pools. 🔒💰 These pools are the mercantile markets for Solomon's favorite tokens on Solana. 🏛️💎 1 🙏 Total supply = 1,998,000 SOLOMON, the amount of gold Shekels King Solomon earned in one year according to 1 Kings 10:14. 📜
